researchResults.title: Memories AI is building the visual memory layer for wearables and robotics
researchResults.description: Memories.ai is building a large visual memory model that can index and retrieve video-recorded memories for physical AI.

researchResults.title: Nvidia’s version of OpenClaw could solve its biggest problem: security
researchResults.description: Nvidia announced an open enterprise AI agent platform, called NemoClaw, that is built off of viral OpenClaw.

researchResults.title: Jensen Huang just put Nvidia’s Blackwell and Vera Rubin sales projections into the $1 trillion stratosphere
researchResults.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said he expects $1 trillion worth of orders for the chips.

researchResults.title: Picsart now allows creators to ‘hire’ AI assistants through agent marketplace
researchResults.description: Picsart's AI agent marketplace will launch with four agents, then add more agents each week.

researchResults.title: Warren presses Pentagon over decision to grant xAI access to classified networks
researchResults.description: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted that Grok, xAI's controversial chatbot, has created harmful outputs for users and poses a potential national security risk.

researchResults.title: NVIDIA Details New A.I. Chips and Autonomous Car Project With Mercedes
NVIDIA Unveils Faster AI Chips Sooner Than Expected
